data.title: Ethereum Whale Scoops Up $32M in ETH as Bitcoin, Solana Whales Cash Out
data.description:
The Ethereum whale buy signals institutional interest, analysts said, while a Solana whale dumped $93M, showing a shift in market preference.
source: https://decrypt.co/345624/ethereum-whale-scoops-up-32m-in-eth-as-bitcoin-solana-whales-cash-out

data.title: WinkLink and DigiFinex reached a strategic cooperation
data.description: WinkLink, the decentralized oracle network within the TRON ecosystem, and DigiFinex, a digital asset trading platform, have officially established a strategic partnership. The two parties will strengthen the integration of exchange infrastructure and oracle services, jointly build a transparent and trusted data ecosystem, and promote the large-scale application of blockchain technology in the real economy. This collaboration will bring more real-world application scenarios to users of the DigiFinex and WinkLink ecosystems.

data.title: Who Are You Trying to Protect?
data.description:
As the SEC loosens custody rules for digital assets, it's not a win for deregulation but a concession to reality. Investor protection now hinges on keeping people inside a broken system, not perfecting it.
source: https://www.blockhead.co/2025/10/23/who-are-you-trying-to-protect/

data.title: KuCoin Announces Launch of KuPool, Its Mining Pool Service, Further Upgrading Its Ecosystem
data.description: KuCoin today announced the launch of KuPool, its mining pool service, further upgrading its ecosystem and establishing a new paradigm for "hash power finance." Led by mining expert Zhu Yu, KuPool leverages KuCoin's strengths in security and compliance to create an efficient and transparent mining system. KuPool supports mainstream and merged mining cryptocurrencies such as LTC, DOGE, PEPE, Lucky, and BELLS, and will soon launch a BTC mining pool. KuPool is committed to providing global miners with verifiable hash power and a trusted mining experience, fully embodying KuCoin's new brand proposition: "Trust First, Transactions Later."

data.title: AI-powered Web3 dating platform METYA secures $6 million in strategic funding led by Echo3 and Greenwood Global Capital
data.description: METYA, an AI-powered Web3 dating platform, has officially announced the completion of a $6 million strategic funding round led by Echo3 and Greenwood Global Capital. Metya is an AI-powered Web3 dating platform that combines social interaction with a token economy, enabling users to connect globally and earn financial benefits through participation. METYA offers real-time communication, content creation, and data sharing, all powered by a decentralized social infrastructure.

data.title: UK Government and OpenAI Expand Data Hosting Agreement
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the UK government has reached an agreement with OpenAI to broaden the scope of data hosting. This development marks a significant step in enhancing data management capabilities between the two entities.

data.title: EU Sanctions Russian-Backed A7A5 Stablecoin to Curb Evasion
data.description:
EU targets A7A5 stablecoin, pegged to the Russian ruble, to address sanctions evasion. Implementation set for November 25, 2025.
source: https://coincu.com/news/eu-sanctions-a7a5-stablecoin/

data.title: OKX to launch BLUAIUSDT perpetual contract
data.description: According to official news, OKX will officially launch the BLUAIUSDT perpetual contract on its website, app, and API at 6:00 PM (UTC+8) on October 23, 2025. Bluwhale is reportedly the intelligent layer of Web3, leveraging consumers' mobile devices to collaborate on decentralized data, storage, and computing power.

data.title: A whale withdrew another 8.515 million PROVE from Binance and Bybit, bringing its total holdings to $21.14 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, a whale (0x352...8792) withdrew another 8.515 million PROVE tokens from Binance and Bybit, valued at $6.84 million. The whale currently holds a total of 25.97 million PROVE tokens, valued at $21.14 million.

data.title: WazirX bets on zero-fee crypto trading to drive relaunch after long hiatus
data.description:
WazirX’s phased comeback begins Oct. 24, offering 30 days of zero-fee trading as the exchange rebuilds liquidity and trust after a long hiatus.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/wazirx-restart-zero-fee-trading-after-hack?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss%3F_dc%3D1761215383837%26cachebust%3Dtrue&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Google's quantum chip Willow achieves verified quantum acceleration, threatening Bitcoin's encryption security again
data.description: Google's latest quantum processor, Willow, has achieved experimentally verified quantum acceleration, operating at speeds far exceeding Frontier, the world's most powerful supercomputer, marking the entry of quantum computing into the reproducible experimental stage. Research shows that Willow is approximately 13,000 times faster at executing physical algorithms, completing tasks in just two hours that would take a traditional computer 3.2 years to simulate. Experts point out that while this breakthrough is still in the research stage, it brings quantum computing one step closer to practical application and poses potential risks to the elliptic curve cryptography that Bitcoin relies on. Christopher Peikert, a professor at the University of Michigan, warned that quantum computing poses a "substantial and even existential risk" to Bitcoin in the long term, although the short-term threat remains limited. (Decrypt)

data.title: Crypto has become Kim Jong-Un’s lifeline — and Russia’s secret weapon
data.description:
According to a new report, crypto is earning North Korea billions in foreign currency every year and it's helping Russia acquire weapons.
source: https://protos.com/crypto-has-become-kim-jong-uns-lifeline-and-russias-secret-weapon/

data.title: US national debt reaches a new ATH of $38 trillion
data.description:
The US national debt has surpassed $38 trillion, marking one of the fastest increases in history and raising fiscal alarm.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/us-national-debt-ath-of-38-trillion/

data.title: Revolut prepares to launch crypto services in Europe after securing MiCA license
data.description: Fintech giant Revolut is poised to launch its cryptocurrency services across the EU after receiving a license under the EU's Markets in Crypto-Assets Directive (MiCA). Revolut announced Wednesday that it has received a MiCA license from the Cyprus Securities and Exchange Commission. This license allows Revolut to promote its cryptocurrency services in 30 countries within the European Economic Area. Revolut's MiCA license also heralds the imminent launch of "Crypto 2.0." The company stated that the new service will provide users with access to over 280 cryptocurrencies, zero-fee staking services, and zero-difference stablecoin to USD conversions. (DL News)

data.title: WLFI reserves ALT5 Sigma CEO suspended, shares down 83% from 52-week high
data.description: ALT5 Sigma, a publicly traded company that recently announced the adoption of a WLFI reserve strategy, has had its CEO, Peter Tassiopoulos, suspended by the board and relieved of his paid duties. Jonathan Hugh has been appointed acting CEO, effective immediately. The management changes come as the company's stock price has fallen nearly 20% over the past week, and 83% from its 52-week high of $10.95. The company's next earnings report is due on November 18.

data.title: Succinct Advances ZK Proofs for Arbitrum with Key Milestone
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Succinct has announced a significant advancement in providing zero-knowledge (ZK) proofs for Arbitrum. The company has successfully verified real Arbitrum blocks, including those involving Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM) smart contracts written in Solidity and Stylus smart contracts written in Rust and C languages.

To achieve this milestone, Succinct developed several features within its SP1 proof system. These include memory access management and the capability to convert WebAssembly (WASM) code into the RISC-V architecture.

Earlier this year, in August, Succinct entered into an exclusive one-year partnership with Tandem to deliver ZK proofs for Arbitrum.

data.title: UK Reform Party Leader Says Party Has Started Accepting Cryptocurrency Donations
data.description: According to Reuters, Reform UK leader Nigel Farage said on Wednesday that his party has begun accepting cryptocurrency donations, but he denied that this was an attempt to emulate US President Trump's strategy of seeking support from the digital asset industry. At a cryptocurrency conference in London, Farage sought to position himself as the "only hope" for UK crypto businesses. He revealed that Reform UK has received several crypto donations, but did not provide specific details. When asked if any crypto businesses were donors, he said, "Not that I know of," adding that "there may have been some sponsorship from conferences." Currently, the Reform Party holds only five seats in the 650-seat parliament, but opinion polls show it in the lead, with the next general election due in 2029. Farage emphasized that he publicly supported cryptocurrencies before Trump and mentioned that he holds crypto investments for a long time and "occasionally has fun when the market is good."

data.title: The three whales have accumulated more than 23,000 ETH in the past 24 hours
data.description: According to spotonchain monitoring, whales have been frantically buying ETH at the bottom in the past 24 hours: the whale address "0x395" withdrew 12,000 ETH (about 46.3 million US dollars) from Binance at a price of US$3,854 about 18 hours ago, and currently holds a total of 67,981 ETH (about 264 million US dollars); the new whale address "0x86E" withdrew 8,491 ETH (about 32.5 million US dollars) from OKX at a price of US$3,824 about 5 hours ago; the RadiantCapital hacker exchanged 9.7 million DAI for 2,550 WETH through three wallets about 6 hours ago, with an average price of US$3,803, and has been laundering the coins through Tornado Cash.

data.title: CZ calls Peter Schiff’s tokenized gold a ‘trust me bro’ asset
data.description:
Peter Schiff reiterated that Bitcoin will “go to zero” and warned that the US dollar’s era as the global reserve currency is ending, predicting a return to a gold-based system.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/cz-calls-peter-schiffs-tokenized-gold-trust-me-bro-asset?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
